---
title: "Method resources"
subtitle: "Open courses, data, and other resources"
page-layout: full

listing: 

- id: ba-courses
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 1
  image-height: 325px
  contents:
    - path: https://media-methods.github.io/programming-with-r/
      image: /files/images/symbols/coding.webp
      title: "Digital Methods I - Programming with R for Social Scientists"
      description: "This undergraduate course provides an introduction into empirical social science research with R."

- id: open-courses
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 325px
  contents:
    - path: https://github.com/valeriehase/rezfo-data-donation
      image: /files/images/symbols/social-media.webp
      title: "Data Donation Studies for Collecting Digital Trace Data"
      description: "This workshop provides an introduction into collecting digital trace data using data donations."

    - path: https://valeriehase.github.io/textasdata-ms/
      image: /files/images/symbols/code.webp
      title: "Text-as-Data"
      description: "This workshop provides an introduction into automated text analysis with R."
      
    - path: https://valeriehase-studying-online-news-css.share.connect.posit.cloud/
      image: /files/images/symbols/coding1.webp
      title: "Web scraping with R"
      description: "This undergraduate course provides an introduction into R and web scraping."
---

## BA courses

:::{#ba-courses}
:::

## Open Courses

:::{#open-courses}
:::

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
